headline: TKO Group (TKO) Stock: Are You Ready to Look Beyond the Near-Term Concerns?
summary: TKO Group Holdings Inc (NYSE:TKO) is one of the best stocks to buy in 2026 according to billionaire George Soros. On April 27, Bernstein SocGen Group reiterated an Outperform rating on TKO Group Holdings Inc (NYSE:TKO) but lowered its price target to $240 from $250. The new price target still indicates substantial upside potential. For […]

headline: ‘AI Leisure Play’: Morgan Stanley Picks 2 Entertainment Stocks to Buy
summary: Much of the discussion around AI has centered on its impact on the workplace and the digital economy. Questions surrounding jobs remain unresolved, while the so-called “SaaSpocalypse” has reflected the software sector’s struggle to adapt to rapidly changing dynamics. Yet, AI is not limited to the workplace.
